name: Shub's Nana
location: Unknown — cottage of brick beside a dark rushing brook, nearly a day south of Lankshorn
description: A crone who serves the Nag-Lord. Not a crookhorn herself, but operates in his interest by procuring children and sending them north to be eaten. Uses silver goblins as intermediaries and travels by sleigh.
notes: Can be summoned on moonlit nights by speaking the phrase Leeleeglablea, which also calls the silver goblins who collect children on her behalf.
Constable Wolder struck a deal with her to make children disappear from Lankshorn, intending to undermine Lord Malbleat and reinstate Lord Ramius.
The three breggles — Marialla, James, and Fisk — serve as her ground-level operatives, delivering children to the goblins.
Her cottage is of brick, set beside a dark and rushing brook, nearly a day's travel south of Lankshorn. Wolder was transported there by goblins from the Jaunty Horn inn along the Ditchway.
Wolder described being grabbed by goblins, transported to the cottage, and returned to the woods outside Lankshorn before he understood what had happened — this was several months ago.
